scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/ace-bridge && npm run build -w packages/vscode-extension
scripts.build:conductor-hub: tsc -b packages/conductor-hub-shared packages/conductor-hub-core packages/conductor-hub-persistence packages/conductor-hub-mcp packages/conductor-hub-adapter
scripts.build:all: npm run build:conductor && npm run build:conductor-hub
scripts.typecheck:conductor-hub: tsc -b packages/conductor-hub-shared packages/conductor-hub-core packages/conductor-hub-persistence packages/conductor-hub-mcp packages/conductor-hub-adapter --pretty
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck:conductor && npm run typecheck:conductor-hub
